title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Do you try to live in an environmentally friendly way? How?
What changes do you think would make the biggest difference to the environment?
Do you think individuals or companies are more responsible for pollution?
Have you changed any habits recently to be greener?
Do you think climate change is taken seriously enough in your country?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think individuals or governments are more responsible for protecting the environment?
Is it fair to ask people to change their lifestyle to reduce environmental damage?
What do you think is the most important environmental issue of our time?
